Senior Backend Engineer

Acme Corp
San Francisco, CA · 2 weeks ago · 87 people clicked apply · Responses managed off LinkedIn
About the role
Acme is hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to lead our payments platform. You will design distributed systems that move money safely at scale.

What you'll do
  • Own services in Go and Postgres powering core ledger writes.
  • Drive the technical design of a new double-entry accounting subsystem.
  • Mentor junior engineers and shape the team's roadmap.
Requirements
  • 5+ years building backend systems in production.
  • Comfortable owning on-call rotations for payment-critical services.
